title: Basic JQuery for web development
author: Priya
content:
Take Quiz

Dynamic Front-end JS Library - JQuery

DOM

Document Object Model (DOM) is a platform and language-neutral interface that allows programs and scripts to dynamically access and update the content, structure, and style of a document jQuery methods for Dom manipulation -> text() , html() , val() ,append() ,prepend(),attr()

AJAX

AJAX is the art of exchanging data with a server, and updating parts of a web page - without reloading the whole page.It takes data from the server in the background and displays it on the web page. -> load() ,$.get(),$.post().

JQuery applications

jQuery simplifies ->

  • HTML dom manipulation
  • Event handling
  • CSS templates
  • AJax call

Cross site scripting (XSS) -> An attacker embeds malicious code (often JavaScript) into a vulnerable website. When user run those scrips in their browser as they look comes from a trusted site users make websites more susceptible to attackers they can steal data such as user session cookies and data.
jQuery is vulnerable to XSS attacks.
88% of website uses jQuery but it poses biggest security threats by attackers . Attackers may manipulates JS code ,add malicious content into the web page or even ,steal user data, hijack sessions, or inject rogue content.
